summary.method: Web search + cross-reference (Healthgrades, Doximity, firm websites, Google Maps, state bar directories)

clinics.name: Texas Diabetes & Endocrinology
clinics.bestGuess: 4521 Medical Center Drive, Suite 400, McKinney, TX 75069
clinics.notes: Dr. Casaubon is at Texas Diabetes & Endocrinology (Austin-based). McKinney clinic at this address is 'Texas Associates of Endocrinology & Diabetes, P.A.' Doctor attribution may be a data-entry mismatch.

clinics.name: MR. DOUGLAS CONNER
clinics.bestGuess: UNCERTAIN
clinics.notes: No general surgeon named Douglas Conner in McKinney. Closest match: Dr. Douglas Conner (Orthopedic Surgery) in Richardson, TX. Name spelling possibly wrong — could be 'Donald Conner' or wrong specialty.

clinics.name: Just For Kids Dentistry
clinics.bestGuess: 601 S Main Street, Suite 220, Keller, TX 76248
clinics.notes: Dr. Jeffrey A. Hoffman DDS practices at Just For Kids Dentistry — but in KELLER, TX, not McKinney. City label appears wrong; this is his only office.

clinics.name: ABC Pediatrics

clinics.name: plano

clinics.name: Next Gen

clinics.name: Clinica San Miguel
